title: Tach Guard Audit
description: Ledger-integrity report (`tach guard audit --json`). Re-derives a guard run's durable history from outside the agent: the SHA-256 event hash chain, each receipt's anchoring to a chain event and untampered input_hash, and the consistency of the recorded verified bit with what the receipts support. This is detection, not prevention — with no sandbox an agent with .tach write access can corrupt its own ledger, but it cannot forge a self-consistent one without inverting SHA-256.

chain_ok.description: The event hash chain self-authenticates and links unbroken.

chain_detail.description: Human summary, or the first broken link.

receipts_ok.description: Every receipt is anchored to a receipt.created event in the verified chain and its input_hash recomputes.

state_consistent.description: The recorded verified bit matches the verdict the receipts actually support.
